stories.headline: NEMA forecasts 55% jump in U.S. electricity demand by 2050, with data centers driving 38% of net growth
stories.summary: The National Electrical Manufacturers Association projects data center load up 300% over 10 years and EV load up 2,000% by 2050, with grid build-out lagging far behind — PJM Western Hub real-time printed $20.57/MWh this morning with nuclear (30.7 GW) and gas (28.0 GW) carrying the load.

stories.headline: DC Circuit hears challenge to DOE emergency orders keeping two Indiana coal plants running
stories.summary: Michigan, Minnesota, Illinois and EDF argue Energy Secretary Wright's emergency orders to forestall retirement of the Indiana coal units exceeded statutory authority, with petitioners pegging the cost of one order at $180 million through March 31 — argument set for 9:30 a.m. today.

stories.headline: EPA deregulates toxic wastewater limits on coal-fired plants
stories.summary: EPA moved Thursday to roll back the Biden-era effluent limitation guidelines for coal-fired power plants, part of a broader push to extend the operating life of fossil generation as PJM and other RTOs strain to meet reliability requirements.

stories.headline: LCV launches $1.2M ad campaign hitting Scott Perry on energy costs in 'Big Beautiful Bill'
stories.summary: The League of Conservation Voters' $4M accountability buy starts in Bill Huizenga's (R-Mich.) district and rolls into PA-10 next, framing Rep. Scott Perry's vote on the OBBB as a vote to raise constituent energy bills — Juan Ciscomani (R-Ariz.) also targeted.

stories.headline: PA State Police creating new unit to investigate threats against elected officials
stories.summary: PSP is standing up a dedicated threats unit after a communications failure around Adam Berryhill's May 6 arrest left most of the 20 Philadelphia-area Democratic state lawmakers on his alleged hit list unaware until the document was made public this week.

stories.headline: Lehigh Valley Democratic primaries Tuesday test progressive vs. party-establishment lanes
stories.summary: Tuesday's primaries in HD-22 (Rep. Ana Tiburcio vs. Allentown Councilwoman Ce-Ce Gerlach) and HD-104 (Rep. Dave Madsen vs. Swatara Twp. Commissioner Shane Steele) are framed as a fight over whether Democrats push graduated income tax and minimum-wage hikes or focus on incremental, big-tent wins.

stories.headline: Senate Banking marks up Digital Asset Clarity Act in bipartisan vote
stories.summary: Chairman Tim Scott's committee advanced the crypto market-structure bill Thursday with the industry-backed framework intact after Scott ruled bank and law-enforcement amendments out of order — Warner and Lummis led the bipartisan push, Warren and Schumer flagged unprecedented industry spending.

stories.headline: Senate parliamentarian strikes major sections of GOP immigration reconciliation language
stories.summary: Parliamentarian MacDonough ruled Thursday that large CBP funding sections and a $2.5B DHS slush fund violate the Byrd rule; Republicans are rewriting, and the Judiciary title — which carries $1B for Trump's ballroom security — goes through the bath today.

stories.headline: House T&I close to highway bill markup with new EV registration fee
stories.summary: Chairman Sam Graves (R-Mo.) expects to release a $550–600B surface transportation reauthorization as soon as Friday, including a Highway Trust Fund EV fee — Graves previously tried $250 EV / $100 hybrid fees in OBBB — with markup teed up for next week.

stories.headline: Trump claims 'fantastic' trade and Boeing deal as Beijing visit wraps
stories.summary: Trump told Hannity Xi 'strongly' committed not to send military equipment to Iran and that China agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets — below market expectations, sending Boeing shares down — while Beijing called for reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: Pirates 7, Rockies 2: O'Hearn homers, Mlodzinski (3-3) gets the win
stories.summary: Ryan O'Hearn went 3-for-4 with a two-run shot off Chase Dollander in the first and Endy Rodriguez drove in two in his return; Michael Mlodzinski allowed two runs over five innings as the Bucs (24-20) close out Colorado and host the Phillies tonight at PNC.

stories.headline: Steelers drop 2026 schedule: home opener vs. Falcons, NFL Paris Game vs. Saints, Black Friday vs. Broncos
stories.summary: Pittsburgh's slate released Thursday night includes four primetime games (TNF Week 4 at home vs. Cleveland leads off), the first-ever NFL regular-season game in France against New Orleans, and the 14th-easiest strength of schedule per CBS.

stories.headline: Penguins extend Connor Dewar (2yr / $4.5M) and Ilya Solovyov (1yr / $850K)
stories.summary: Dewar's $2.25M AAV deal follows a career-best 14G-16A-30P, plus-16 season; Solovyov inks a one-year contract as Pittsburgh enters an offseason still facing decisions on UFA Evgeni Malkin and Sidney Crosby's final contract year.

market_data.as_of: May 15 7:08 a.m. EPT (PJM RT) · May 8 close (Henry Hub) · May 15 a.m. (WTI)
